case_title: AVALON BAY COMMUNITIES INC VS. XAVIER HOUSTON et al

docket_entries.description: HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT XAVIER HOUSTON'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED. XAVIER HOUSTON HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR# 4280 (D206)
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD, CASE SETTLED.
MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR DEC-22-2008 VACATED.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Allan Horwitz for Plaintiff Avalon Bay Communities, who is present.
Dan Engler, Limited Scope Attorney, for Defendant Xavier Houston, who is present.

Settlement Conference held. Case settled. Settlement terms are as stated in the settlement agreement, which was filed with the court for premises located at 388 Beale Street, #813, San Francisco, CA. See scanned document. Trial date of 12/22/08 is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Paul Purdue, Clerk Melinka Jones, not reported. (218)
